docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANIEL  ROSENBLEDT VALLORY ROSENBLEDT TRUSTEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAXE MORTGAGE CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
